nasb.text: Then she arose and departed, and removed her veil and put on her widow’s garments.

esv.text: Then she arose and went away, and taking off her veil she put on the garments of her widowhood.

cnv.text: 他瑪起來走了，脫去帕子，再穿上守寡的衣服。

ccb.text: 事后，她起来走了。她拿掉蒙脸的布，仍旧穿上寡妇的装束。

csbs.text: 塔玛尔起来走了，拿掉面纱，又穿上自己寡妇的衣服。
